title: Aureline preview share-sheet record
description: Boundary schema for the preview_share_sheet_record frozen in docs/preview/preview_share_contract.md. The share sheet is the chooser surface a user sees before any preview share is minted. Each sheet record is a typed proposal: it cites the underlying preview_snapshot_record (and optionally the preview_runtime_strip_record, hot_reload_state_record, and device_target_descriptor_record) by opaque ref so share semantics reuse preview/runtime identity instead of inventing a parallel anonymous-link model. The schema enforces that proposed_share_mode_class, proposed_share_audience_class, and proposed_share_destination_class form a closed disjoint partition over the six required share-mode rows (local-only, organization-only, temporary-external, one-time-external, policy-blocked, revoked-or-expired); that public/external proposals forbid no_auth_required and no_revoke_required; that mint_admissible = false MUST cite a typed mint_blocked_reason_class and forbids minting; and that revoked / expired / runtime-restarted / target-changed / stale-capture predecessor links cannot be re-proposed under the same identity without naming a regenerate intent. Raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw IP addresses, raw hostnames, raw bearer tokens, raw session cookies, raw expiring credentials, raw rendered bytes, raw stack frames, and raw mock-data bodies never cross this boundary; opaque snapshot / runtime / target / sheet / approval / regenerate handles and class labels do. Adding a new proposed_share_mode_class, proposed_share_audience_class, proposed_share_destination_class, proposed_share_auth_class, proposed_share_expiry_class, proposed_share_revoke_path_class, proposed_share_export_posture_class, proposed_share_resolved_state_class, proposed_share_runtime_lineage_class, proposed_share_continuity_state_class, proposed_share_regenerate_path_class, mint_blocked_reason_class, or sheet_disposition_class value is additive-minor and bumps preview_share_sheet_schema_version; repurposing an existing field is breaking and requires a new decision row.

preview_share_sheet_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this preview share-sheet contract. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields and additive enum values do not bump this version.

opaque_id.description: Opaque stable identifier safe to log, export, or persist. Raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw IP addresses, raw bearer tokens, raw session cookies, and raw expiring credentials never appear here.

redacted_label.description: Reviewer-facing short label safe to render in share-sheet chrome. Raw URLs, raw hostnames, raw account handles, and raw secret values never appear here.

short_summary.description: Reviewer-facing sentence safe to render in share-sheet chrome and export review.

proposed_share_mode_class.description: Closed disjoint share-mode vocabulary the sheet proposes. Mirrors share_mode_class on preview_share_link.schema.json. revoked_or_expired_share_mode is the proposal posture used when a sheet is opened to regenerate from a previously revoked or expired link.

proposed_share_expiry_class.description: Re-export of share_expiry_class from preview_share_link.schema.json minus expired_terminal (a sheet never proposes a terminal-expiry posture).

proposed_share_resolved_state_class.description: Closed proposed-resolution vocabulary the sheet declares for the link it would mint. resolves_to_live_runtime requires the underlying preview_snapshot to be in a live posture. no_resolution_share_blocked is reserved for sheets whose mint is refused (policy_blocked / runtime unavailable / target changed at mint / capture stale at mint).

proposed_share_runtime_lineage_class.description: Closed proposed-lineage vocabulary the sheet declares. The four post-mint-only lineage values from preview_share_link.schema.json (bound_to_runtime_now_restarted, bound_to_runtime_now_unavailable, bound_to_target_now_changed, bound_to_revoked_runtime, bound_to_managed_runtime_now_decommissioned) are not admissible as a sheet proposal; if any are observed at sheet open time, the sheet is refused with mint_admissible = false and a typed mint_blocked_reason_class.

proposed_share_continuity_state_class.description: Closed proposed-continuity vocabulary. A sheet only mints under continuity_intact; continuity_broken_share_blocked records the refusal posture used when the sheet is opened on top of a runtime / target / capture continuity break.

proposed_share_regenerate_path_class.description: Re-export of share_regenerate_path_class from preview_share_link.schema.json. The sheet declares the regenerate path the operator is choosing when the sheet is opened to regenerate from a revoked / expired / terminal predecessor link.

mint_blocked_reason_class.description: Closed mint-blocked reason vocabulary. not_blocked_mint_admissible is reserved for the case where mint_admissible = true.

sheet_disposition_class.description: Closed disposition vocabulary naming what happened to the sheet. sheet_open_proposal is the in-flight chooser posture before any decision. sheet_admitted_minted_link is the success posture (a preview_share_link_record is minted). sheet_refused_* are the refusal postures. sheet_admitted_regenerate_from_* are the success postures used when a sheet is opened on top of a revoked / expired / terminal predecessor link.

preview_snapshot_record_ref.description: Opaque ref to the underlying preview_snapshot_record this sheet projects from. Required so share semantics reuse preview/runtime identity.

predecessor_share_link_record_ref.description: Opaque ref to the predecessor preview_share_link_record this sheet was opened to regenerate from, when applicable. Required when sheet_disposition_class is in {sheet_admitted_regenerate_from_revoked, sheet_admitted_regenerate_from_expired, sheet_admitted_regenerate_from_terminal_predecessor}.

minted_share_link_record_ref.description: Opaque ref to the preview_share_link_record this sheet minted, when applicable. Required when sheet_disposition_class = sheet_admitted_minted_link or any sheet_admitted_regenerate_from_*.

proposed_expires_at.description: Proposed expiry timestamp. Required when proposed_share_expiry_class is in {short_lived_minutes_expiry, short_lived_hours_expiry, explicit_timestamp_expiry}; null otherwise.

mint_admissible.description: True iff every proposed posture is admissible against share policy / audience / destination / auth / expiry / revoke / export / runtime lineage / continuity. False forces a non-no_denial mint_blocked_reason_class and a refusal disposition.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque approval-ticket ref required when proposed_share_auth_class = approval_ticket_required.

allOf.description: proposed_share_audience_class = workspace_local_only_no_share MUST pair with proposed_share_mode_class = local_only_share_mode, proposed_share_destination_class = local_workspace_anchor_only, proposed_share_auth_class = no_auth_required, proposed_share_expiry_class = no_expiry_local_only, proposed_share_revoke_path_class = no_revoke_required, proposed_share_export_posture_class in {export_disabled_no_share, export_metadata_only}, and proposed_expires_at = null.

proposed_share_audience_class in {workspace_signed_in_only, organization_signed_in_only, tenant_signed_in_only} MUST pair with proposed_share_mode_class = organization_only_share_mode, proposed_share_destination_class in {in_app_share_thread, managed_workspace_share_endpoint, managed_organization_share_endpoint, managed_tenant_share_endpoint}, proposed_share_auth_class != no_auth_required, and proposed_share_revoke_path_class != no_revoke_required.

proposed_share_audience_class = temporary_external_link_audience MUST pair with proposed_share_mode_class = temporary_external_share_mode, proposed_share_destination_class in {temporary_external_browser_link, approved_third_party_relay}, proposed_share_auth_class != no_auth_required, proposed_share_revoke_path_class != no_revoke_required, and proposed_share_expiry_class in {short_lived_minutes_expiry, short_lived_hours_expiry, explicit_timestamp_expiry}.

proposed_share_audience_class = one_time_external_link_audience MUST pair with proposed_share_mode_class = one_time_external_share_mode, proposed_share_destination_class in {one_time_external_browser_link, approved_third_party_relay}, proposed_share_auth_class in {step_up_auth_required, one_time_token_required, approval_ticket_required}, proposed_share_revoke_path_class != no_revoke_required, and proposed_share_expiry_class = one_time_use_expiry.

proposed_share_audience_class = policy_blocked_no_share_audience MUST pair with proposed_share_mode_class = policy_blocked_share_mode, proposed_share_destination_class = no_destination_share_blocked, proposed_share_export_posture_class = export_disabled_no_share, proposed_share_resolved_state_class = no_resolution_share_blocked, proposed_share_runtime_lineage_class = no_lineage_share_blocked, proposed_share_continuity_state_class = continuity_broken_share_blocked, mint_admissible = false, mint_blocked_reason_class != not_blocked_mint_admissible, sheet_disposition_class = sheet_refused_policy_blocked, and proposed_share_regenerate_path_class != no_regenerate_required.

proposed_share_audience_class = not_shareable_inherent_surface MUST pair with proposed_share_mode_class = policy_blocked_share_mode, proposed_share_destination_class = no_destination_share_blocked, mint_admissible = false, and sheet_disposition_class = sheet_refused_policy_blocked.

mint_admissible = true requires mint_blocked_reason_class = not_blocked_mint_admissible, proposed_share_continuity_state_class = continuity_intact, proposed_share_resolved_state_class != no_resolution_share_blocked, proposed_share_runtime_lineage_class != no_lineage_share_blocked, and sheet_disposition_class in {sheet_admitted_minted_link, sheet_admitted_regenerate_from_revoked, sheet_admitted_regenerate_from_expired, sheet_admitted_regenerate_from_terminal_predecessor}.
sheet_disposition_class in any sheet_admitted_* posture requires a non-null minted_share_link_record_ref.
sheet_disposition_class in any sheet_admitted_regenerate_from_* posture requires a non-null predecessor_share_link_record_ref.
proposed_share_auth_class = approval_ticket_required requires a non-null approval_ticket_ref.
proposed_share_expiry_class in {short_lived_minutes_expiry, short_lived_hours_expiry, explicit_timestamp_expiry} requires a non-null proposed_expires_at.

proposed_share_export_posture_class = export_full_record_admitted_internal_only is admissible only on proposed_share_audience_class in {workspace_signed_in_only, organization_signed_in_only, tenant_signed_in_only}; external audiences MUST NOT propose a full-record export.

preview_share_sheet_record.description: One preview share-sheet record. The sheet is a typed proposal: proposed_share_* fields project the audience, destination, auth, expiry, revoke path, export posture, resolution, runtime lineage, continuity, and regenerate-path the operator has chosen. The schema enforces that mint_admissible = true is reachable only when every proposed posture is admissible against share policy, that mint_admissible = false carries a typed mint_blocked_reason_class, and that any sheet_admitted_regenerate_from_* disposition cites the predecessor preview_share_link_record this sheet was opened to regenerate from.
